content.query:
SELECT          DISTINCT OH.CUNO AS CUSTOMER_NUMBER
,               CM.CUNM AS CUSTOMER_NAME
,               OH.ORNO AS SALES_ORDER
,               OH.CUOR AS PO_NUMBER
,               OH.UCA3 AS BOL_ARN
,               OD.DLIX AS DELIVERY_NUMBER
,               OH.RASN AS RAIL_STATION
,               MPTRNS.ETRN AS EXTERNAL_TRACKING_NO
,               MPTRNS.DLRM AS REMARK
FROM            M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_OCUSMA CM ON OH.CUNO = CM.CUNO
JOIN            M3_ODHEAD OD ON OH.ORNO = OD.ORNO
WHERE           OH.CUOR = '5XBTWPGA'
